title: International approaches to recording and monitoring corruption
body: "This report, completed in 2022,  was commissioned by the Home Office to the University of Sussex’s Centre for the Study of Corruption.  The report’s authors reviewed international practice in two important areas of anti-corruption work to help guide UK approaches to evidence gathering. First, approaches to recording, estimating and proactively detecting corrupt behaviours, and second, approaches to monitoring and evaluation (M&E) of national anti-corruption strategies. The report assessed practices in 15 countries, selected by the authors either because they are peer countries to the UK or because they exhibit elements of good practice. "
